title: arenaria aggregata subsp. aggregata
intro: Arenaria aggregata subsp. aggregata, also known as white sandwort, is a plant species that belongs to the carnation family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of white sandwort include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation and pain, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of white sandwort can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
